mircap mircap
version 0
module 1 branch_weights
type 1 i32
type 2 u32
symbol 1 main function
function 1 1 - 1 3 0 1,1,2
func_block 1 1
func_block 1 2
func_block 1 3
func_block 1 4
block 1 1 1 2 3
block 2 1 4 5 6
block 3 1 7
block 4 1 8
insn 1 const_i32 r:0 i:0
insn 2 const_i32 r:1 i:10
insn 3 branch b:2
insn 4 const_i32 r:0 i:1
insn 5 lt_i32 r:2 v:0 v:1
insn 6 branch_if v:2 b:2 b:3
insn 7 branch_if v:2 b:1 b:4
insn 8 trap
